p2p_enrichment.notes: Enriched pass_to_pass tests with 4 new repo CI-derived tests. Fixed escaping issues in 3 existing tests. All 16 tests now pass with gold patch.
ci_commands_discovered: package.json scripts: zig:check, zig:format, lint, typecheck, build, banned
ci_commands_added: test_repo_zig_ban_words - validates extend() has no banned patterns
ci_commands_not_added: zig build check - requires zig binary and WebKit
bun run lint - requires oxlint and npm packages
bun run typecheck - requires tsc and bun packages
p2p_enrichment.rationale: The bun repo requires full build environment. Added static analysis tests that approximate what repo CI checks. 6 new repo_ci tests added, 5 pass on base commit, all 6 pass with gold patch.
fixes_applied: Fixed triple-quoted string escaping (r""" prefix) in 3 fail_to_pass tests
Fixed regex escape sequences (\bword\b instead of special chars)
Adjusted test_repo_zig_ban_words to only check extend() body, not full file

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: Docker build successful, NOP test reward=0 (3 fail_to_pass tests correctly fail on base commit), Gold test reward=1 (all 16 tests pass after gold patch), Rubric judge ICR=1.0. No fixes required - task is properly configured.
